summary: Verified CQC-ready expiry system implementation. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend displays correct Work Status, Recruitment File, Policies, and Progress cards with proper microcopy. Document Status card correctly hidden when no expiry dates tracked.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: document_status object in statuses with expired_count, expiring_soon_count, valid_count, has_critical_expired
✅ Backend: Document status values (expired, expiring_soon, all_valid, no_expiry_tracked) with correct colors
✅ Backend: Document status label format matches spec (X Expired, X Expiring Soon, All Valid, No Expiry Dates)
✅ Backend: has_critical_expired flag present for critical expiry override
✅ Backend: expired_docs and expiring_soon_docs lists returned
✅ Backend: start_status includes reason field with standardized microcopy
✅ Backend: Ready to Work reason: 'All required checks are complete. This employee can safely start work.'
✅ Backend: Not Ready reason: 'Essential checks are missing. This employee cannot start work.'
✅ Backend: start_status has all required fields (status, label, color, complete, verified, total, missing, reason)
✅ Backend: start_status valid values (ready_to_work, supervised_start_only, not_ready)
✅ Backend: employees list returns expiry_alerts object with expired_count, expiring_soon_count, has_alerts
✅ Backend: requirements have expiry tracking fields (tracks_expiry, expiry_status, expiry_date)
✅ Backend: evidence files have expiry_status when applicable
✅ Backend: statuses has all sections (start_status, recruitment_file, policies, document_status, overall_compliance)
✅ Backend: overall_compliance has percentage, complete, verified, total fields
✅ Frontend: Work Status card displays with correct label and microcopy
✅ Frontend: Recruitment File card displays with correct label and microcopy
✅ Frontend: Policies card displays with correct label and microcopy
✅ Frontend: Progress card displays with correct label and microcopy
✅ Frontend: Document Status card correctly hidden when status is 'no_expiry_tracked'
✅ Frontend: Employee list shows Work Status, File Status, Progress columns
✅ Frontend: Work Status badges show 'Ready to Work' (green) and 'Not Ready' (red)

critical_expiry_override.behavior: If any critical doc expired, has_critical_expired=true and start_status overrides to 'not_ready'

work_readiness_microcopy.not_ready: Essential checks are missing. This employee cannot start work.
work_readiness_microcopy.supervised_start: Employee can start with supervision. Some training is still needed.
work_readiness_microcopy.ready_to_work: All required checks are complete. This employee can safely start work.

critical_code_review_comments: Expiry system implementation is complete and follows CQC standards
Document Status card correctly conditionally rendered based on expiry tracking
Work readiness microcopy matches specification exactly
CRITICAL_EXPIRY_DOCS constant correctly includes RTW and DBS documents
Note: Test employees don't have expiry dates set, so Document Status card shows 'No Expiry Dates' - this is expected behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: CQC-ready expiry system fully implemented. Backend returns document_status with expired_count, expiring_soon_count, valid_count, has_critical_expired. Work readiness includes 'reason' field with standardized microcopy. Document Status card in ComplianceOverview only shows when documents have expiry dates tracked. To test expiry functionality fully, upload a document with an expiry date set. CRITICAL_EXPIRY_DOCS = {right_to_work_documents, right_to_work_check, dbs_certificate, dbs_check}.
